coordinateSystem.origin: Room grid 0,0 maps to Unity world 0,0,0.

prefabConventions.wallPrefabForward: Outward from the room through the wall face.
prefabConventions.wallPrefabLocalSize: Local X spans the wall length, local Y is height, local Z is thickness.
prefabConventions.spawnPrefabPivot: center of the 1m tile at floor height.
